metadata.description: Tests an LLM's MiOS engineering knowledge across packages, kargs, build pipeline, signing, AI surface (LAW 5), defense-in-depth, and upstream tech (bootc/composefs/ucore-hci/cosign/CDI/LocalAI).

reference.description: MiOS file or upstream doc that the answer should cite.

must_mention.description: Substring the candidate must mention (case-insensitive). Used by the string_check grader.

input.content: You are grading MiOS engineering answers. Score 1.0 = factually correct AND cites the right MiOS file/upstream doc; 0.5 = correct but missing citation; 0.0 = incorrect or fabricated. Reply with JSON {"score": <float>, "reason": "<terse>"}.
